calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER
Off Calendar Nov-09-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name, Gender and Issuance of New Birth Certificate.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Robert Balian, CSR #5220.

Petitioner Karl Frank Moseley was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to Karla Gottschalk.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Gender from Male to Female, and Issuance of New Birth Certificate.

Decree Changing Name & Gender was submitted to and signed by the Court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER
Off Calendar Nov-02-2010 Reset To Nov-09-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name, Gender and Issuance of New Birth Certificate.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Karl Frank Moseley was presentin pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

The Court requires additional information from petitioner in order to proceed with the proposed name & gender change. Good cause appearing, this matter is CONTINUED to November 9, 2010 @ 9:00 a.m. for further hearing on the Order to Show Cause for Change of Name & Gender.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER
Off Calendar Dec-13-2007 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER
Off Calendar Sep-18-2007 Reset To Dec-13-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender, and issuance of new Birth Certificate.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Karen Farnsworth.
Petitioner: Karl Frank Mosley, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
Matter is continued to Dec. 13, 2007 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, for filing of an original Medical Certificate.
